message:
feat(tui): find-in-detail text search with highlighting and navigation (5my66)

Implement Ctrl+F/slash find-in-detail within the detail modal:
- Detail modal intercept: routes /, j/k scroll, n/N find nav, Tab tab cycle, w wrap toggle
- Find bar with live text input, backspace, Esc to close
- apply_find_highlight computes matches; render cache syncs to handler
- Auto-scroll to current match on navigation (line - 3 offset)
- Case-insensitive matching with yellow highlight + orange current
- 13 new tests covering toggle, query change, navigation, modal intercept, highlighting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
